title: Dataset v5 system-faults plan — 5 chaos-mesh injected infrastructure-level scenarios
description:
Phase D11 system-level fault coverage for v5-large. Uses chaos-mesh NetworkChaos (3 scenarios), DNS partition (1 scenario via NetworkChaos partition to kube-dns), and StressChaos (1 memory-pressure scenario). Does NOT cover IOChaos (disk latency) or TimeChaos (clock skew) — those need sidecar injection / privileged init that isn't set up in v5-large; deferred to v5.1. Each run produces 5 system-fault active_fault windows (2 ticket_worthy critical: cart-redis partition + dns-block-cartservice; 2 ticket_worthy major: network-latency-currency + memory-pressure-cartservice; 1 borderline: packet-loss-frontend).

Prerequisite: chaos-mesh installed in the cluster (chaos-testing namespace + CRDs). See docs/gcp-production-dataset-vm-runbook.md 'Install chaos-mesh'.
target_use: Phase D11 — system-level fault injection. Adds DNS / network-partition / packet-loss / network-latency / memory-pressure shapes to v5-large.

scenarios.notes: D11.3 DNS outage — chaos-mesh NetworkChaos partition cartservice -> kube-dns.
D11.4 network partition between cartservice and redis-cart.
D11.5 30% packet loss on frontend — borderline shape.
D11.6 500ms network latency added to currencyservice.
D11.9 memory pressure on cartservice via chaos-mesh StressChaos.
